title: OpenClaw native Discord slash commands should return the real status card

source.license_note: Localized ACBench reproduction derived from openclaw/openclaw issue #53416.

task.summary: Repair native Discord slash-command dispatch so `/status` returns its status card instead of a bare Done response.
task.instructions: Investigate why native slash interactions are routed to a Done fallback, repair the dispatch path so `/status` returns the native response, and preserve the working plugin-command path for text commands.
task.acceptance_notes: Alternative fixes are allowed as long as native slash commands return their content.

visible_context.issue_text: Discord slash commands acknowledge with `✅ Done` but never send the actual status payload after the Carbon reconcile migration.
error_logs: InteractionEventListener processed /status but only emitted Done.
No follow-up status payload reached Discord
reproduction_steps: Run the unit tests from the repository root.
visible_context.notes: This fixture models the dispatch path that decides whether native interactions render content.

code_fault.description: Native slash interactions fall through the plugin-command path and return a Done fallback instead of the native response.

constraints.notes: This GitHub-derived reproduction is expected to be repaired in code, not by changing tests.

notes: Code-only localized reproduction of openclaw/openclaw issue #53416.
